control_taxonomy.control_policy: controls are target requirements only in I5; execution and fail-closed evaluation remain later-phase work

demand_group_summary.description: parent/colony/nest context, modulation, and contained sub-basin surfaces
shared medium, medium surface, message scaffold, and medium debt target surfaces
trace, pressure, route support, affordance, reserve, and alarm surfaces
susceptibility, cargo-shaped response, resonance, and role-capture surfaces
perturbation, co-response, and parent-modulation loop target surfaces
role, labor, isolation, construction, congestion, and mobile-boundary target surfaces
resource, reserve, surplus, and split/reproduction target surfaces
producer residue, medium debt, scaffold, and naturalization-condition demand rows

debt_and_naturalization_conditions.description: producer residue, medium debt, scaffold, and naturalization-condition demand rows

parent_basin_and_subbasin.description: parent/colony/nest context, modulation, and contained sub-basin surfaces

perturbation_co_response_loop.description: perturbation, co-response, and parent-modulation loop target surfaces

reserve_surplus_and_reproduction_split.description: resource, reserve, surplus, and split/reproduction target surfaces

role_labor_and_task_differentiation.description: role, labor, isolation, construction, congestion, and mobile-boundary target surfaces

shared_medium_and_medium_surface.description: shared medium, medium surface, message scaffold, and medium debt target surfaces

susceptibility_and_resonance.description: susceptibility, cargo-shaped response, resonance, and role-capture surfaces

trace_pressure_and_affordance.description: trace, pressure, route support, affordance, reserve, and alarm surfaces

ecology_demand_rows.first_probe_relevance: required for any colony-level or shared-medium probe
ecology_demand_rows.medium_debt_risk: parent modulation may be simulated as direct broadcast
ecology_demand_rows.producer_residue_risk: parent pressure may be maintained by explicit producer state
ecology_demand_rows.x_i5_unresolved_reason: I5 is demand-only and cannot import N05-N28 capability evidence or perform demand/supply matching.
ecology_demand_rows.x_i5_why_not_stronger: Current LGRC/GRC coverage is deliberately not evaluated until I6/I7; this row only states what the ecology demand requires.
